Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: Harvey Korman guests. Features a number about glory & crisis of mid-life. On "Carol & Sis", Carol goes gaga.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars. Includes a take-off of film noir "Laura." Also: Stella Toddler meets The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Tim & Harvey are generals at the signing of a peace treaty, while "The Family" gathers for Mae's funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol welcomes Vincent Price and Joan Rivers!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joan Rivers, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Marty Feldman & Carol Channing guest. Features an airline crew who causes havoc, and wacky commercial spoofs.
Video.title: Marty Feldman, Carol Channing

Video.summary: Guests Mickey Rooney and John Davidson join Carol and Vicki to tell the tale of "The Four Funns Of Broadway."
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Shecky Greene & Eydie Gorme join for a rundown of TV programs. Also: "Carol & Sis" & "Ironstreet & Wife."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters guests and is interviewed by Harvey. In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Harvey struggle with names.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Guest stars Steve Lawrence & Sally Struthers join in "Late, Late Movie" spoofs. Also: "The Boring Twenties."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Sally Struthers

Video.summary: Guests Mama Cass Elliot and Ken Berry offer up some musical numbers and a series of commercial parodies.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for the movie spoof "Sinful Woman", a presentation of the Lyle-hosted Tearjerker Theatre.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson arrives for the Q&A...but she only has eyes for Lyle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Helen Reddy & John Byner appear in parodies. John is in a "Nora Desmond" sketch, and Vicki plays columnist.
Video.title: Helen Reddy, John Byner

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson joins the Q&A. Sketches include "Carol & Sis" where the Bradfords discourage an operator.
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Bing Crosby & Paul Lynde appear in "As The Stomach Turns." On "The Old Folks", Lynde joins the elderly duo.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence guest! A chimp bites Tim in one sketch, while another looks at relationships.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Dom DeLuise is Carol's guest for a night of sketched, including a murder investigation and "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke appears in a homage to Shirley Temple films, "Little Miss Showbiz", with Carol as Honey Bunny.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests! Featuring an improv comedy performance.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Scoey Mitchell is Carol's guest. Featuring "The Queen Elizabeth Show", a Q&A and a "Queen & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell

Video.summary: Carol Channing & Steve Lawrence guest. Features "As The Stomach Turns", & "Carol & Sis" in a nudist colony.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Harvey leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family. Carol interviews Hugh Handsome, and a cameo by Bob Hope!
Video.title: Bob Hope

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Vincent Price guest. They play guests at a hotel where Carol is the operator. Also "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn stars in the latest sketch with "The Family" as the pretentious director and star of a play.
Video.title: Madeline Kahn

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns", & reflecting on Carol's Charwoman persona.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Features a take-off of the classic film "National Velvet", and a sketch with Carol & Harvey as a couple.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Peter Lawford guests. Sketches include an evening with "Carol & Sis", and Lawford wooing his mail order bride.
Video.title: Peter Lawford
